property.name: buttonLabel
property.label: Button Label
property.description: Label displayed on the Generate PDF button.

property.name: vfPageName
property.label: Visualforce Page Name
property.description: API name of the Visualforce page used to render the PDF (without the /apex/ prefix).

property.name: pdfFileName
property.label: PDF File Name (optional)
property.description: Static file name for the PDF. Leave blank to auto-generate from object + record ID + date.
